query:
SELECT cs.user_id,cs.team_id
        FROM challenge_solves cs
        WHERE cs.challenge_id = $1
          AND (
              cs.user_id = $2
              OR EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1 FROM team_members tm
                  WHERE tm.team_id = cs.team_id AND tm.user_id = $2
              )
          )
        ORDER BY cs.solved_at
        LIMIT 1
